# Templates Pack

Template files are grouped by process:

- start here: [INDEX.md](INDEX.md)

- `checklists/` startup and control checklists
- `orders/` order text templates
- `organization/` organization requisites and company cards
- `personnel/` multi-employee dossier templates
- `journals/` journal registry templates
- `execution/` executive documentation registers and daily reports
- `execution/scan_ingest_quickstart.md` scan routing and archive quickstart
- `telegram/` message-rule seed templates

All templates are editable drafts and should be adapted to customer wording and legal details.
